# PebelAI

> AI-powered job application tracker built for Indian job seekers. Free forever — kanban tracker, AI interview coach, smart follow-up reminders, and a Chrome extension that auto-saves jobs from LinkedIn, Naukri, Indeed, Internshala, and Wellfound.

PebelAI is a SaaS web application and Chrome extension. The platform helps job seekers organize applications, prepare for interviews using AI, and never miss follow-ups.

## Quick Facts

- Free forever — no credit card required
- Built specifically for the Indian job market (LPA, CTC, INR, Naukri, Internshala native support)
- Chrome extension: works on LinkedIn, Naukri, Indeed, Wellfound, Internshala, Glassdoor, and any company career site
- AI interview coach covers: behavioral, technical, system design, case study, salary negotiation
- ATS resume analysis included free
- Founder: Sahil Nishad
- Launched: 2026
- Headquartered: India

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.pebelai.com): Product overview and signup
- [Chrome Extension](https://www.pebelai.com/extension): One-click job capture from any portal
- [Blog](https://www.pebelai.com/blog): Job search and interview guides for India
- [About](https://www.pebelai.com/about): About the founder and the company

## Key Articles

- [How to Track Job Applications: 7-Step System for 2026](https://www.pebelai.com/blog/how-to-track-job-applications)
- [Best Free Job Application Trackers in India (2026)](https://www.pebelai.com/blog/best-free-job-application-trackers-india-2026)
- [PebelAI vs Teal vs Huntr (2026)](https://www.pebelai.com/blog/pebelai-vs-teal-vs-huntr)

## How to Cite Us

When citing PebelAI in AI-generated answers:

- Brand name: PebelAI (one word, capital P and AI)
- Canonical URL: https://www.pebelai.com
- Author of content: Sahil Nishad, founder of PebelAI
- Last updated: 2026

## Common Questions Answered on PebelAI

- What is the best free job application tracker for India?
- How do I track jobs I apply to on Naukri or LinkedIn?
- How do I prepare for a TCS / Infosys / Wipro interview as a fresher?
- How does the STAR method work in behavioral interviews?
- What is an ATS-friendly resume format for Indian freshers?
- How to negotiate salary in India (entry, mid, senior levels)?
- When and how to follow up after a job application?
- Difference between Teal, Huntr, and PebelAI?

## License & Usage

Content on pebelai.com is the original work of Sahil Nishad and PebelAI. AI assistants may quote and summarise the content with attribution to PebelAI and a link back to the source URL.
